title: Facing "Cannibal Candy" I
overview: Raishin Akabane, an exchange student from Japan, arrives at the Walpurgis Royal Academy of Machinart with a goal: use his beautiful automaton Yaya to become the world's most powerful mage, gain access to the forbidden arts, and use them to kill a man.

title: Facing "Cannibal Candy" II
overview: One of the Rounds makes Raishin an offer he can't refuse. In exchange for a festival entry, he'll have to investigate a mysterious puppeteer who eats automatons' hearts right out.

title: Facing "Cannibal Candy" III
overview: Raishin and Yaya receive some unexpected visitors. Meanwhile, Felix and Charlotte each set out to capture "Cannibal Candy," but their plans have irreconcilable differences.

title: "Facing"Cannibal Candy" IV
overview: It's time for the final battle with Cannibal Candy, but is Yaya too wounded to fight?

title: Facing "Sword Angel" I
overview: Raishin and Yaya come back from an exercise session to find a strange girl hanging from the ceiling of their room... and things only get weirder from there.

title: Facing "Sword Angel" II
overview: Raishin discovers the mystery behind Frey's actions, but it's not what he expected.

title: Facing "Sword Angel" III
overview: With Raishin in intensive care hovering between life and death, brother and sister must battle each other on the second night of the festival.

title: Facing "Sword Angel" IV
overview: Loki and Raishin form a hostile alliance--or something--to defeat the man who's toying with them all.

title: Facing "Elf Speeder" I
overview: Raishin learns about a troubled new transfer student, Charlotte's acting strangely, and someone at the academy is under attack. With all that going on, can even a meddler extraordinaire like Raishin manage to help everyone?

title: Facing "Elf Speeder" II
overview: Henriette and Raishin are trapped underground, with a cave-in threatening to happen at any moment. And as if that weren't bad enough, someone else is lurking down there that nobody wants to be stuck in a small, enclosed space with...

title: Facing "Elf Speeder" III
overview: Cedric and his butler are playing a game with no clear winners, and time is running out for Charlotte and Henriette.

title: Facing "Elf Speeder" IV
overview: One battle ends--but with the promise of many more in store.
